title: Dr. STONE - Medusa
description: Dr.STONE - Medusa is a mod that adds the Medusa device from Anime&Manga Dr.Stone that turns living things into stone
body:
Dr.STONE - Medusa is a mod that adds the high-tech device known as the Medusa from Manga and Anime Dr.Stone, which turns living things into stone, petrifying them. If you were wanting to play around with the device for yourself, this is just the mod for you!

Be aware that while petrified, you may be pretty much immortal, but you can't move or communicate with others for the brief period of time you are in stone.

Have fun and, look out for the sky...
